objective: Export the LSP server config boundary types used by plugins and make scoped LSP configs expose the validated config fields consumed by the LSP manager.
changes: Added an exported LspServerConfig interface matching the plugin LSP schema fields.
Updated ScopedLspServerConfig to extend LspServerConfig and include the dynamic plugin scope plus source metadata.
Added a shared LspServerStatus union with the stopping runtime state used by LSP server lifecycle code.

verification.notes: The LspServerConfig TS2305 errors and LSPServerManager extensionToLanguage TS2339 errors no longer appear in the tsc log.

next_candidates: Add TaskStateBase to src/Tool.ts for local workflow and monitor MCP tasks.
Add targeted internal-only module declarations for protectedNamespace, attributionTrailer, TerminalCaptureTool prompt, VerifyPlanExecutionTool constants, peerSessions, and workerAgent.
